policy: Openness != 'any app'. A harness is ALLOWED (may run against the full vault) only when its vendor's no-train/ZDR scope is contractually VERIFIED to cover tool-call/API egress of vault content AND MNPI. PENDING/REJECTED => default-deny: that harness runs ONLY against a projected, sensitive-tier-free workspace (brain project). val-03's cross-harness test set MUST equal the VERIFIED subset of this register. We hold NO model API keys; egress rides the desktop app vendor's enterprise agreement, so each vendor is a DISTINCT contract that must be verified separately.
bar: no-train: vendor contractually excludes our content from model training
ZDR (zero data retention) or bounded retention compatible with MNPI handling
scope explicitly covers tool-call / API egress of vault content, not just chat UI
scope explicitly names MNPI / material-non-public handling, or the tenant's DPA does

harnesses.surface: Claude Desktop Chat + Code tab (the actual egress; we hold no keys)
harnesses.claimed_terms: Enterprise/Team no-train; ZDR available on enterprise agreements (NOT verified against the signed organization contract here)
harnesses.verification_step: the organization's Legal/Procurement to confirm the signed Anthropic enterprise agreement's no-train + ZDR clauses explicitly cover tool-call/API egress of vault content AND MNPI; attach clause references.

harnesses.surface: Codex CLI (reads AGENTS.md, shells the brain CLI)
harnesses.claimed_terms: OpenAI API/Enterprise no-train default; ZDR by request (NOT verified for this tenant)
harnesses.verification_step: Confirm the OpenAI tenant agreement's no-train default applies to Codex CLI tool-call egress AND a ZDR endorsement covers MNPI; attach the tenant DPA reference.
harnesses.owner: the maintainer (accountable) + the organization's Cyber/CISO team (executes)

harnesses.surface: Gemini CLI (contextFileName=AGENTS.md, shells the brain CLI)
harnesses.claimed_terms: Gemini for Workspace/Vertex no-train on paid tiers; consumer Gemini DOES train (must be excluded)
harnesses.verification_step: Confirm the Google Workspace/Vertex tier in use is a no-train paid tier (NOT consumer Gemini) and its DPA covers tool-call egress of vault content AND MNPI; attach the tier + DPA reference.
harnesses.owner: the maintainer (accountable) + the organization's Cyber/CISO team (executes)

default_posture: Until a harness is VERIFIED, it is treated as PENDING and may run ONLY against `brain project --dest <dir> --max-tier Internal` (a projection that physically omits Confidential/Restricted/MNPI + all unlabelled notes). The full-vault path is gated on VERIFIED posture.
